title: pyrenacantha longirostrata
intro: Pyrenacantha longirostrata is a plant species belonging to the family Icacinaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, derived from its bark, leaves, and roots. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. In herbal preparations, Pyrenacantha longirostrata is typically used as a decoction or infusion of its bark and leaves, often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
